title: psychotria hirsuticalyx
intro: Psychotria hirsuticalyx, also known as the hairy-leaved psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria hirsuticalyx include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Psychotria hirsuticalyx can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
